training_status: labor-intensive work (12-hour overnight shifts, 14,000+ steps/day, stair climbing 2-3x/hour, lifting 50lb bags multiple times/hour)

benefits.description: 9kg (19.8 lbs) weight loss in 14 days; visible belly shrinkage and tighter appearance; clothes and work uniforms fit noticeably better around waist and chest
Mirror changes ahead of scale; recomp feels real with inches lost
Energy during overnight shifts has stayed surprisingly solid; energy improved after lowering dosages

side_effects.description: Fatigue when not eating enough; fatigue experienced until dosages were lowered
Appetite increased, especially after bumping SLU and 5-Amino dosages
DMSO burns like mad when pinned too fast

protocol_notes: OP reconstituted from raw powder (10g purchased) except for Retatrutide. Uses DMSO as solvent. High protein intake (300-350g/day), carbs limited to <50g/day, intermittent fasting, 14,000+ steps daily at work, high labor intensity. Monitors blood glucose and blood pressure. Later comment indicates OP dialed back dosages after 3 weeks: 5-Amino to 40mg/day and SLU to 20mg/day with phenomenal results. Also reported using DMSO in vials.
